description: Corporate agency landing page for a mobile development company featuring a hero section with headline and “Learn More” CTA plus top navigation (Home, About, Services, Contact). Below are an about overview block, a services grid with icon cards, stats counters, a testimonial section, and a “Get in Touch” contact panel with address/phone/email and social links.

Subscription plan selection screen with three tiers—Free, Pro ($19), and Enterprise (contact us)—displayed as prominent vertical cards highlighting pricing, key benefits, and select/subscribe buttons, followed by a detailed features comparison table listing numerous functionalities with checkmarks or indicators showing availability across each plan.

Case studies portfolio page with top navigation tabs for Home, Case Studies, and Blog, featuring a scrollable grid of project thumbnails displaying client logos and titles like Usable, Ichosen, and Nauto, followed by a prominent "Discover Remote" featured section with descriptive text on powering global teams and an additional grid of related visuals.
